$comment: Descriptor for agent-skill marketplaces/indexers (e.g. SkillsMP) and for discovery. The canonical install paths are: `npx shadow-tutor install`, `./install.sh`, or Codex `$skill-installer <repo-url>`.
name: shadow-tutor
description: Post-session programming tutor. After an AI-assisted coding session, it teaches you why the AI made each decision and drills you with forced-recall exercises — fighting the skill atrophy AI coding causes.
author: Shadow Tutor contributors
